subcodes.first_line: O thou remnant of that radiant star! When thou didst reach that realm and frontier, and from that rose-garden of love didst gather flowers and sweet basil [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یادگار آن کوکب لائح چون بان مرز و بوم رسیدی و از آن گلشن عشق گل و ریحان
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
